---
title: "Predictions"
---

```{r}
source("R/load_data.R")
predictions <- load_predictions()
fixtures <- load_fixtures()
prediction_view <- dplyr::left_join(predictions, fixtures, by = "match_id")
```

```{r}
reactable::reactable(
  prediction_view,
  searchable = TRUE,
  filterable = TRUE,
  defaultPageSize = 20,
  bordered = TRUE
)
```
